This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-c226-q6fx-6j6c. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.6 contains an allowlist bypass vulnerability in the macOS Swift exec feature that misses combined POSIX inline-command flags. Attackers can execute shell content outside the intended allowlist check by using combined flag forms, potentially allowing unauthorized command execution depending on operator configuration.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g796-jqmx-wf9q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:52:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g796-jqmx-wf9q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g796-jqmx-wf9q"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:04Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:32:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-c226-q6fx-6j6c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53861", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-allowlist-bypass-via-combined-posix-inline-flags-on-macos", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g796-jqmx-wf9q"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: macOS Swift exec allowlist missed combined POSIX inline flags", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T14:52:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g796-jqmx-wf9q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.5.5"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T14:52:17Z"}
